<!-- Generated by AgentReady (LLM-first mode) | Dynamic section: do not edit manually. Static section in agent-context.json: safe to edit. -->

```yaml
# =============================================================================
# Food Delivery Platform — Agent Working Memory Schema
# Project: Polyglot microservices (Kotlin/Java/Python/Go/TypeScript)
# Primary: Java (Spring Boot) | Gateway: Kotlin | Inventory: Python/FastAPI
#          Driver: Go | Notifications: TypeScript/Node.js
# =============================================================================

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. SESSION STATE
# Tracks the current task, phase, and runtime context for this coding session.
# Reset or update at the start of each new task.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
session_state:
  task_id: ""                     # Short identifier for the current task, e.g. "add-refund-endpoint"
  task_description: ""            # Human-readable description of what is being built or fixed
  status: ""                      # One of: planning | in_progress | blocked | review_ready | complete
  phase: ""                       # Current phase: e.g. design | implementation | testing | refactor | PR_prep

  active_service: ""              # Which microservice is the primary focus this session:
                                  # api-gateway | order-service | inventory-service |
                                  # driver-service | notification-service | cross-service

  active_language: ""             # Language in focus: Kotlin | Java | Python | Go | TypeScript
  active_build_system: ""         # Build system for active service: maven | gradle | pip | go_mod | npm

  entry_point_confirmed: false    # Whether OrderServiceApplication.java or the relevant service
                                  # entry point has been verified as the correct starting point

  working_branch: ""              # Git branch name for isolation of changes
  last_completed_step: ""         # Free-text summary of the last successfully completed action
  next_planned_step: ""           # Free-text summary of the next intended action

  rabbitmq_exchange_in_use: ""    # Name of the RabbitMQ exchange being published to/consumed from;
                                  # default for order events is "order.events" — do not rename

  order_status_context:           # Track which OrderStatus transitions are relevant to the current task
    current_status_under_edit: "" # e.g. PENDING, ACCEPTED, PREPARING, etc.
    new_transition_needed: false  # true if a new status or transition is being added to the state machine
    isValidTransition_updated: false  # MUST be true before merging if new_transition_needed is true
                                      # Both the enum AND the switch expression must be updated together

  stripe_capture_mode_aware: false  # Confirms agent knows Stripe uses MANUAL capture —
                                    # PaymentIntent must be explicitly captured after ACCEPTED,
                                    # not at creation time; critical for payment-related tasks

  jwt_propagation_aware: false    # Confirms agent knows downstream services receive customer identity
                                  # via X-Customer-Id header injected by JwtAuthFilter, not raw JWT

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. DECISIONS_MADE
# Records architectural and technical decisions with full rationale.
# Append a new entry for every non-trivial choice made during the session.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
decisions_made:
  - decision_id: ""               # Unique short ID, e.g. "D-001"
    timestamp: ""                 # ISO 8601 datetime when the decision was made
    service_affected: ""          # Which service(s) are affected: e.g. order-service, cross-service
    component_affected: ""        # Specific class/file, e.g. OrderService.java, main.py
    decision_summary: ""          # One-sentence summary of what was decided
    rationale: ""                 # WHY this approach was chosen over alternatives
    alternatives_considered: []   # List of other options that were evaluated and rejected
    trade_offs: ""                # Known downsides or risks of this decision
    constraints_respected: []     # Which project constraints drove this decision, e.g.:
                                  # "must not rename order.events exchange",
                                  # "Stripe uses MANUAL capture",
                                  # "X-Customer-Id injected by JwtAuthFilter",
                                  # "OrderStatus state machine enforced by isValidTransition"
    reversible: true              # Whether this decision can be easily undone
    follow_up_required: false     # Whether a follow-up task or PR is needed to complete the intent

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. FILES_MODIFIED
# Tracks every file touched in this session with context about why and how.
# One entry per file; update in place if the same file is modified again.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
files_modified:
  - path: ""                      # Repo-relative path, e.g. order-service/src/main/java/com/fooddelivery/order/service/OrderService.java
    service: ""                   # Which microservice owns this file
    language: ""                  # Java | Kotlin | Python | Go | TypeScript
    change_type: ""               # One of: added | modified | deleted | refactored
    reason: ""                    # Why this file was changed in context of the current task

    lombok_annotations_present: false   # true if the Java file uses @Getter/@Setter/@Builder —
                                        # reminder to use generated accessors, never direct field access

    jpa_entity: false             # true if this is a JPA @Entity — flag for migration awareness;
                                  # schema changes require a corresponding DB migration script

    sqlalchemy_model: false       # true if this is a SQLAlchemy model in inventory-service —
                                  # DATABASE_URL must use postgresql+asyncpg:// scheme

    async_context: false          # true if this file uses async/await (FastAPI routes, asyncpg) —
                                  # all callers must be async-aware

    rabbitmq_producer: false      # true if this file publishes to a RabbitMQ exchange —
                                  # exchange name "order.events" must not be changed

    rabbitmq_consumer: false      # true if this file consumes from a RabbitMQ queue —
                                  # queue/exchange binding must remain consistent across services

    stripe_integration: false     # true if this file touches Stripe logic —
                                  # MANUAL capture flow must be preserved; requires thorough review

    state_machine_touched: false  # true if OrderStatus or isValidTransition was modified —
                                  # both the enum constants AND the switch expression must be updated

    public_api_changed: false     # true if REST endpoint signatures or response shapes changed —
                                  # openapi.yaml must be updated in coordination across all services;
                                  # openapi.yaml itself is a restricted write path

    restricted_path_warning: false  # true if this path appears in restricted_write_paths:
                                    # .env, .env.example, go.sum, package-lock.json, openapi.yaml,
                                    # .github/workflows/*.yml — these require explicit human approval

    test_coverage_added: false    # Whether tests were added or updated to cover this change
    notes: ""                     # Any additional context relevant to future turns

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. TESTS_RUN
# Records test executions and their outcomes to track quality across the session.
# One entry per test run invocation.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
tests_run:
  - run_id: ""                    # Unique short ID for this test run, e.g. "T-001"
    timestamp: ""                 # ISO 8601 datetime of the test run
    service: ""                   # Which service was tested: order-service | inventory-service |
                                  # driver-service | notification-service | api-gateway

    framework: ""                 # Test framework used: JUnit | pytest | go_test | Jest
    command: ""                   # Exact command executed, e.g. "cd order-service && mvn -B verify --no-transfer-progress"
    test_directory: ""            # e.g. order-service/src/test

    scope: ""                     # One of: unit | integration | contract | e2e
    triggered_by: ""              # What change or task triggered this test run

    result: ""                    # One of: passed | failed | partial | skipped
    total_tests: 0                # Total number of test cases executed
    passed: 0
    failed: 0
    skipped: 0

    failing_tests: []             # List of failing test names/classes for quick reference
    failure_summary: ""           # Brief description of failure cause if result != passed

    coverage_percent: null        # Code coverage percentage if reported by the framework
    new_tests_added: []           # List of new test class/file names added this session

    order_status_transitions_tested: []   # Which OrderStatus transitions have test coverage,
                                          # e.g. [PENDING->ACCEPTED, ACCEPTED->PREPARING]
                                          # Important: isValidTransition must be tested for new transitions

    stripe_flow_tested: false     # Whether Stripe MANUAL capture flow was exercised in tests
    rabbitmq_events_tested: false # Whether RabbitMQ publish/consume was covered (even via mocks)
    redis_lock_tested: false      # Whether Redis distributed lock behavior was tested in inventory-service

    notes: ""                     # Any caveats, known flaky tests, or environment issues

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. OPEN_QUESTIONS
# Items that need human review, external input, or deferred decisions.
# Review and resolve before marking any task as complete.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
open_questions:
  - question_id: ""              # Unique short ID, e.g. "Q-001"
    timestamp: ""                # ISO 8601 datetime when the question was raised
    raised_by: ""                # "agent" or "human"
    service_context: ""          # Which service or component this question relates to
    question: ""                 # The actual question or unresolved item

    category: ""                 # One of:
                                 # schema_migration       — JPA/SQLAlchemy model changes needing DB migration
                                 # api_contract           — Changes to REST contract that affect openapi.yaml
                                 # cross_service          — Changes with ripple effects across multiple services
                                 # security               — JWT config, secrets, auth bypass concerns
                                 # payment                — Stripe integration decisions needing review
                                 # state_machine          — New OrderStatus values or transitions
                                 # idempotency            — Notification service deduplication durability
                                 # infrastructure         — Docker Compose, health checks, port changes
                                 # lock_ttl               — Redis lock TTL adequacy for new operations
                                 # build_system           # Cross-service build/dependency concerns

    blocking: false              # Whether this question blocks forward progress on the current task
    resolution: ""               # Filled in when the question is answered
    resolved: false              # Set to true once resolution is confirmed

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. DOMAIN STATE
# Tracks live runtime knowledge about domain models, service state, and
# framework-specific invariants that must persist across turns in a session.
# This is the "what the agent currently understands about the system" section.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
domain_state:

  # --- Order Lifecycle (Java/Spring Boot — order-service) ---
  order_lifecycle:
    known_statuses:               # All currently defined OrderStatus enum values
      - PENDING
      - ACCEPTED
      - PREPARING
      - READY_FOR_PICKUP
      - IN_TRANSIT
      - DELIVERED
      - CANCELLED
      - REFUNDED

    new_statuses_added: []        # Any statuses added this session — must be reflected in
                                  # isValidTransition switch expression before merge

    confirmed_valid_transitions:  # Transitions verified as legal by isValidTransition
      - from: PENDING
        to: ACCEPTED
      - from: PENDING
        to: CANCELLED
      - from: ACCEPTED
        to: PREPARING
      - from: ACCEPTED
        to: CANCELLED
      - from: PREPARING
        to: READY_FOR_PICKUP
      - from: READY_FOR_PICKUP
        to: IN_TRANSIT
      - from: IN_TRANSIT
        to: DELIVERED
      - from: DELIVERED
        to: REFUNDED

    stripe_payment_capture_point: ACCEPTED   # The MANUAL capture must be
